title: cymopterus basalticus
intro: Cymopterus basalticus, also known as Basalt Spring-parsley or Basalt Cymopterus, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cymopterus basalticus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Cymopterus basalticus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has also been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
